description.para: Address mapping for the Video PHY core.

sectiondef.header: VPHY core registers: Dynamic reconfiguration port (DRP) registers.

briefdescription.para: DRP control TX MMCM register offset.
DRP status TX MMCM register offset.
DRP control RX MMCM register offset.
DRP status RX MMCM register offset.

sectiondef.header: VPHY core registers: CPLL Calibration registers.
VPHY core registers: Transmitter function registers.
VPHY core registers: Receiver function registers.
User clocking registers: MMCM and BUFGGT registers.

briefdescription.para: MMCM TX user clock control register offset.
MMCM TX user clock register 1 offset.
MMCM TX user clock register 2 offset.
MMCM TX user clock register 3 offset.
MMCM TX user clock register 4 offset.
BUFGGT TX user clock register offset.
Misc TX user clock register offset.
MMCM RX user clock control register offset.
MMCM RX user clock register 1 offset.
MMCM RX user clock register 2 offset.
MMCM RX user clock register 3 offset.
MMCM RX user clock register 4 offset.
BUFGGT RX user clock register offset.
Misc RX user clock register offset.
Clock detector frequency timer timeout register offset.
Clock detector TX frequency register offset.
Clock detector RX frequency register offset.
Clock detector TX timer register offset.
Clock detector RX timer register offset.
Clock detector DRU frequency register offset.
Clock detector RAW TX frequency register offset.
Clock detector RAW RX frequency register offset.
Clock detector RAW DRU frequency register offset.
DRU center frequency low register offset.
DRU center frequency high register offset.

sectiondef.header: VPHY core masks, shifts, and register values.

briefdescription.para: Shift bits for core patch details.
Shift bits for core version revision.
Shift bits for core minor version.
Shift bits for core major version.
RX SYSCLKSEL out mask based on GT type.
TX SYSCLKSEL out mask based on GT type.
RX SYSCLKSEL data mask based on GT type.
TX SYSCLKSEL data mask based on GT type.
RX SYSCLKSEL out shift based on GT type.
TX SYSCLKSEL out shift based on GT type.
RX SYSCLKSEL data shift based on GT type.
TX SYSCLKSEL data shift based on GT type.
CPLL lock status mask for channel.
CPLL lock status mask for all channels.
CPLL lock status mask for HDMI channels.
TX user ready mask for channel.
RX user ready mask for channel.
PLL GT reset mask for channel.
GT reset mask for all channels.
TX user ready mask for all channels.
RX user ready mask for all channels.
PLL GT reset mask for all channels.
PMA reset done mask for channel.
Reset done mask for all channels.
PMA reset done mask for all channels.
CPLL power down mask for channel.
QPLL0 power down mask for channel.
QPLL1 power down mask for channel.
RX power down mask for channel.
RX power down shift for channel.
TX power down mask for channel.
TX power down shift for channel.
Log event GT PLL Layout Change.
Log event VidClk more than 148.5 MHz.
Log event Vid not supported no DRU.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log event Vid format not supported.
Log event MMCM Config not found.
Log event DRU clk wrong freq.
Log event usrclk more than 297 MHz.
This typedef enumerates the Video PHY log events.
This typedef enumerates the possible error conditions.
This typedef enumerates the Linerate to TMDS Clock ratio for HDMI TX TMDS Clock pattern generator.
